Paste these rules into:
Firebase Console → Firestore Database → Rules → Publish

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ALSO: Add these Storage rules separately at:
Firebase Console → Storage → Rules → Publish

rules_version = '2';
service firebase.storage {
  match /b/{bucket}/o {
    // User-attached post images (uploaded by the post author)
    match /rumblr/posts/{uid}/{fileName} {
      allow read:  if true;
      allow write: if request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == uid;
    }
    // Auto-generated OG card images (written by the post author at creation time)
    match /rumblr/og/{fileName} {
      allow read:  if true;
      allow write: if request.auth != null;
    }
  }
}

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
FIRESTORE RULES (below):
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

rules_version = '2';
service cloud.firestore {
  match /databases/{database}/documents {

    // Admin is identified by their Firebase Auth UID alone.
    function isVerifiedAdmin() {
      return request.auth != null
          && request.auth.uid == 'xNRN4Ae3VTeYqXB4XvcsDMXVABZ2';
    }

    // Posts: anyone can read; authenticated users or AI system can create
    match /posts/{postId} {
      allow read: if true;
      allow create: if request.auth != null
                 || request.resource.data.is_ai_generated == true;
      allow update: if request.auth != null
                 && (request.auth.uid == resource.data.author_uid
                  || isVerifiedAdmin());
      allow delete: if request.auth != null
                 && (request.auth.uid == resource.data.author_uid
                  || isVerifiedAdmin());
    }

    // User profiles: anyone can read; owner can write their own; verified admin can delete any
    match /users/{uid} {
      allow read: if true;
      allow write: if (request.auth != null && request.auth.uid == uid)
                || isVerifiedAdmin();
    }

    // Likes: anyone can read; must be logged in to write
    match /likes/{docId} {
      allow read: if true;
      allow write: if request.auth != null;
    }

    // Reposts: anyone can read; must be logged in to write
    match /reposts/{docId} {
      allow read: if true;
      allow write: if request.auth != null;
    }

    // Follows: anyone can read; only the follower can write/delete their own docs
    match /follows/{docId} {
      allow read: if true;
      allow create: if request.auth != null
                 && request.auth.uid == request.resource.data.follower_uid;
      allow delete: if request.auth != null
                 && request.auth.uid == resource.data.follower_uid;
    }

    // AI follows: anyone can read; only verified admin can write
    match /ai_follows/{docId} {
      allow read: if true;
      allow write: if isVerifiedAdmin();
    }

    // Site settings (ticker, etc.): anyone can read; only verified admin can write
    match /settings/{docId} {
      allow read: if true;
      allow write: if isVerifiedAdmin();
    }

    // Tribune editions: anyone can read; only admin can write
    match /tribune_editions/{slug} {
      allow read: if true;
      allow write: if isVerifiedAdmin();
    }

    // BTC (Between The Chalk) editions: anyone can read; only admin can write
    match /btc_editions/{slug} {
      allow read: if true;
      allow write: if isVerifiedAdmin();
    }

    // GitHub PAT for OG page creation — admin-only, stored in config/github
    match /config/{docId} {
      allow read, write: if isVerifiedAdmin();
    }

    // Admin collection: managed via Firebase Console only — no client access
    match /admin/{docId} {
      allow read, write: if false;
    }
  }
}
